results.title: Quitting a job is honestly one of the hardest things for me 😢 This was a job I quit last May and he
results.hook: Quitting a job is honestly one of the hardest things for me 😢 This was a...
results.content: Quitting a job is honestly one of the hardest things for me 😢 This was a job I quit last May and he was such an amazing manager, which made resigning a lot harder… I didn’t wanna put...
results.caption: Quitting a job is honestly one of the hardest things for me 😢 This was a job I quit last May and he was such an amazing manager, which made resigning a lot harder… I didn’t wanna put this video out before, because of how NOT assertive I was when I quit 😅 this is not how you should be doing it - there’s absolutely no reason to put yourself down or overexplain like this… I’m sharing it now because today I said no to my current contract’s lil extension talk with my manager…with zero people-pleasing, and I was really proud of myself 💪🏾 I’ve grown a lot over this past year and have become a lot more assertive and detached emotionally from work, so don’t think any job I quit in the future will have me over explaining like this even tho I’m such a sensitive girlie
results.description: Quitting a job is honestly one of the hardest things for me 😢 This was a job I quit last May and he was such an amazing manager, which made resigning a lot harder… I didn’t wanna put this video out before, because of how NOT assertive I was when I quit 😅 this is not how you should be doing it - there’s absolutely no reason to put yourself down or overexplain like this… I’m sharing it now because today I said no to my current contract’s lil extension talk with my manager…with zero people-pleasing, and I was really proud of myself 💪🏾 I’ve grown a lot over this past year and have become a lot more assertive and detached emotionally from work, so don’t think any job I quit in the future will have me over explaining like this even tho I’m such a sensitive girlie
results.author: streetorvintage
